title: Front Office Manager - The Lalit Hotels - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - The Lalit Hotels - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, The Lalit Hotels in Dhanbad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About The Lalit Hotels:
The Lalit Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Lalit Hotels!
